risks.summary: Stale assessment data could produce misleading current-site claims.
risks.impact: A generated website build prompt may fix or cite problems that are no longer true.
risks.mitigation: Require scan date, source, freshness status, and verification instructions for stale or undated assessments.

risks.summary: Generated client artifacts could leak private central MDE strategy or cross-client learning.
risks.impact: Client repos could expose confidential internal data.
risks.mitigation: Add client-safe artifact review and keep central private ledgers out of generated outputs.

risks.summary: Missing client facts could be invented by generation logic.
risks.impact: Generated websites may claim fake reviews, licenses, locations, guarantees, team details, or project proof.
risks.mitigation: Generate missing client detail questions and content-needed checklist; block unsupported claims.

risks.summary: Assessment report findings may lack exact evidence URLs or verification details.
risks.impact: Generated prompts may repeat unsupported broken link, broken image, or missing page claims.
risks.mitigation: Trace every recommendation to evidence, intake, or documented assumption; require verify-before-implementing for weak evidence.

risks.summary: Generated prompts may drift from the Northvalley website technical baseline.
risks.impact: Future client repos may use inconsistent stack, deployment, or validation tooling.
risks.mitigation: Validate generated technical brief for Next.js, TypeScript, Node 22, npm, OpenNext Cloudflare, wrangler, CI, tests, and audit checks.

risks.summary: Generated deployment instructions may omit main/prod synchronization and deployed SHA recording.
risks.impact: Production deployment could drift from reviewed repository state.
risks.mitigation: Require branch sync check when prod exists, deploy-source documentation, deployed SHA, Worker name, domain, and secrets checklist.

risks.summary: Generated launch packs may be difficult to use in a new client repo.
risks.impact: Ferosh may need to manually reconstruct missing instructions or private context.
risks.mitigation: Validate handoff clarity, grouped client questions, explicit assumptions, and standalone codex-build.prompt.md.

risks.summary: Generated public client website pages may expose AI/process wording, internal notes, placeholders, or template filler.
risks.impact: Visitors may feel the website was AI-created, website-builder-generated, or assembled from internal notes, damaging credibility and conversion.
risks.mitigation: Require generated prompts to include the Lori public-copy guardrail, route-level forbidden phrase scan, placeholder route review, human copywriter read-through, and handoff counts for remaining process wording and public placeholders.

risks.summary: Generated cleanup prompts may validate only local output and miss production-only public setup language, sample URLs, broken navigation, or form fallback issues.
risks.impact: A launched client site could still expose implementation/setup state or removed demo content after deployment.
risks.mitigation: Require production URL validation for public rendering, forbidden wording, deleted sample URLs, customer-facing form fallback language, removed fake content, navigation, and key conversion paths.
